Notice Of Motion And Motion For Recovery Of Compensatory Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendants Terry Brown, Ponce Co., 721 Beach Street Partners, LP's Motion to Set Aside the Judgment Entered November 26, 2008.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John L. Fitzgerald, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Irma Calabretta and Marjorie Calbretta, and for plaintiffs Mario Williams Calabretta, et al.
Shannon Lindsay, Esq. appeared with defendant and moving party Terry Brown, and for defendants 721 Beach Street, Partners, LP and Ponce Co.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, defendants' motion is GRANTED, and the judgment entered November 26, 2009 is hereby SET ASIDE.

Counsel for defendants shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than February 27, 2009.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John L. Fitzgerald, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Mario William Calabretta, Iram Calabretta and Adele Marjorie Calabretta.
No appearance by defendants Tery Brown, an individual, 721 Beach Street, Partenrs, LP, a California Limited Partnership or Ponce Company, a California Corporation.
All parties were given notice of today's trial date at the Settlement Conference on October 29, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Project Description - Undated--------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Note Secured by a Deed of Trust dated 08/12/05---------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 1---Installment Note dated 2/06/95-------------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Mario William Calabretta, et al., and against defendants Terry Brown, an individual, 721 Beach Street, Partenrs, Lp, a California Limited Partnership and Ponce Company, a California Corporation as follows:

Damages - $1,169,345.85.
Lost Profits - $120,000.00
Attorney's Fees - $30,870.25.
Costs - Per Memo, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,320,216.10.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Counsel shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than November 21, 2008.
